subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are servants who have been set ablaze by the fire of the Covenant and have derived illumination from the lights of the resplendent Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد اشتعلوا بنار المیثاق و اقتبسوا من انوار العهد المشرق علی
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for protection
